manifest.name: Material Icons

name: Material Icons

releases.author: Gust4v0Di4sC
releases.description:
## 🔧 Fixes & Improvements

### Bug Fixes
- Fixed icon vertical alignment with file and folder names
- Removed direct `innerHTML` DOM manipulation (replaced with `DOMParser`)
- Removed unnecessary `console.log` statements

### Code Quality
- Fixed `async onload` lint warning
- Improved CSS alignment using `display: flex` on title containers
- Icons now scale proportionally with the interface font size

releases.author: Gust4v0Di4sC
releases.description: Initial release with basic functions, icons on archives and folders.
releases.name: New Release
